ddls:
CREATE TABLE "robots" (
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each robotic model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the robotic model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the robotic model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the robotic model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the robotic model */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of production */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the robotic model */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location where the robot is installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the robot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("robot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robots_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES robot_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robot_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each robot model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the robot model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the robot model */,
  "specifications" TEXT /* Specifications of the robot model */,
  "max_payload" REAL /* Maximum payload the robotic model can handle */,
  "reach" REAL /* Maximum reach of the robotic arm */,
  "power_requirements" TEXT /* Power requirements for the robotic model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robot_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task type */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task type */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the task */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* How often the task is performed */,
  "last_performed" TEXT /* Last time the task was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robot_arms" (
  "arm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each robotic arm */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robotic model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the robotic model */,
  "arm_name" TEXT /* Name of the robotic arm */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the robotic arm */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the robotic arm was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the robotic arm */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location where the robotic arm is installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robot_arms_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robot_arms_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES robot_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kinematic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each kinematic data record */,
  "arm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robotic arm */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being performed */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor collecting the data */,
  "actuator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actuator involved */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist angle of the robotic arm */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder angle of the robotic arm */,
  "elbow" REAL /* Elbow angle of the robotic arm */,
  "wrist_angle" REAL /* Wrist angle of the robotic arm */,
  "wrist_rotate" REAL /* Wrist rotation of the robotic arm */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data format */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kinematic_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kinematic_data_actuator_id FOREIGN KEY ("actuator_id") REFERENCES actuators ("actuator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kinematic_data_arm_id FOREIGN KEY ("arm_id") REFERENCES robot_arms ("arm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kinematic_data_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks_performed ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the sensor */,
  "range" TEXT /* Range of values the sensor can measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "arm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robotic arm */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor type */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the sensor */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "calibration_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the next calibration is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_arm_id FOREIGN KEY ("arm_id") REFERENCES robot_arms ("arm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "value" REAL /* Value recorded by the sensor */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data format */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks_performed ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actuators" (
  "actuator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actuator */,
  "arm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robotic arm */,
  "actuator_name" TEXT /* Name of the actuator */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the actuator */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the actuator was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the actuator */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "maintenance_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actuator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actuators_arm_id FOREIGN KEY ("arm_id") REFERENCES robot_arms ("arm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actuator_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actuator data record */,
  "actuator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actuator */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "value" REAL /* Value recorded by the actuator */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data format */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actuator_data_actuator_id FOREIGN KEY ("actuator_id") REFERENCES actuators ("actuator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actuator_data_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks_performed ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data being accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES kinematic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks_performed" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "arm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robotic arm */,
  "task_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task type */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the task */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the task */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  "task_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the task in seconds */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumed during the task */,
  "output_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the output */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_performed_arm_id FOREIGN KEY ("arm_id") REFERENCES robot_arms ("arm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_performed_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_performed_task_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_type_id") REFERENCES robot_tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "arm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robotic arm */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance in minutes */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the maintenance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations about the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_arm_id FOREIGN KEY ("arm_id") REFERENCES robot_arms ("arm_id")
)
